problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry may resolve What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
